fields.name: The Mockingbird Bookshop
fields.description: From Harper Lee to J.K. Rowling — classics, fantasy, thrillers, and memoirs for every kind of reader.

fields.name: Room 101 Books
fields.description: Dystopian classics, magical realism, and mind-expanding non-fiction. Big Brother disapproves.

fields.name: The Green Light Bookstore
fields.description: Literary fiction, epic fantasy, and history that reads like a thriller. So we beat on, books against the current.

fields.name: The Unread Shelf
fields.description: A curated collection of new and upcoming titles across every genre. Your next great read is waiting.
